text: When you wake up, do you often feel a headache or head pressure?
Do you ever feel shaky or nervous inside for no clear reason?
Do certain thoughts keep coming back even when you try to focus elsewhere?
Do you sometimes feel light-headed when standing or moving around?
Do you find your interest in romantic or physical closeness lower than usual?
Do you catch yourself being overly critical of people around you?
Do you ever feel that your mind is hard to control or feels influenced?
Do you feel that other people cause most of your problems?
Do you forget simple things like where you placed an item or what you planned to do?
Do you worry about making small mistakes or being untidy?
Do you get irritated quickly when something doesn’t go your way?
Do you sometimes notice tightness or strange feelings in your chest when stressed?
Do you feel uneasy walking alone in open areas or crowded streets?
Do you feel tired or slowed down even after resting well?
Do you ever think life is not worth continuing?
Do you ever hear sounds or voices that others don’t seem to notice?
Do your hands or body tremble when you feel tense?
Do you find it hard to fully trust new people you meet?
Do you often skip meals or lose your appetite during the day?
Do you find yourself crying easily over small things?
Do you feel awkward or uneasy while interacting with the opposite gender?
Do you sometimes feel stuck and unable to change your situation?
Do you suddenly feel scared or alarmed without knowing why?
Do you have moments where you lose control of your temper?
Do you hesitate or feel unsafe going out alone?
Do you often blame yourself when things go wrong?
Do you experience back pain after sitting or standing for long?
Do you feel blocked or unable to finish tasks you start?
Do you feel alone even when people are around?
Do you often feel low or in a dull mood during the day?
How often do small worries stay on your mind for too long?
Have you recently lost interest in things you usually enjoy doing?
When nothing seems wrong, do you still feel tense or afraid?
How easily do your feelings get hurt by others’ words or actions?
Have you ever had the sense that people might somehow know your thoughts?
How often do you feel misunderstood by people around you?
Do you sometimes think others are distant or unfriendly toward you?
When completing tasks, do you take extra time to make sure everything’s perfect?
How often does your heart beat faster than normal during stress?
Have you noticed your stomach feeling upset or uneasy for no clear reason?
When comparing yourself with others, how confident do you feel?
How often do your muscles ache even without physical strain?
Have you ever felt that people were watching or talking about you?
How easy is it for you to fall asleep once you go to bed?
When you finish a task, do you double-check it to make sure it’s right?
How often do you find it difficult to make decisions, even small ones?
Do you feel calm while traveling on public transport such as buses or trains?
Have you ever struggled to catch your breath during normal activity?
How often do you feel sudden waves of heat or cold for no reason?
Are there certain places or things you prefer to avoid because they make you uneasy?
Have you ever had moments when your mind suddenly goes blank?
How often do you feel tingling or numbness in parts of your body?
When emotional, do you feel a tight lump in your throat?
How confident do you feel about your future plans?
How often do you find it hard to stay focused while studying or working?
Have you noticed weakness or heaviness in parts of your body?
How often do you feel tense even during quiet moments?
Do your arms or legs sometimes feel heavy or tired without much reason?
How frequently do thoughts about death or mortality cross your mind?
When you’re stressed, do you tend to eat more than usual?
How comfortable do you feel when people are watching or talking nearby?
Have you ever felt that certain thoughts just appear in your mind unexpectedly?
How often do you feel strong urges to act out in anger or frustration?
When you wake up early, do you find it hard to fall back asleep?
How often do you repeat certain actions (like rechecking, counting, or washing) to feel sure?
How restful is your sleep on most nights?
When you’re upset, do you ever feel like breaking or throwing things?
Have you ever held ideas or opinions that others found unusual?
How self-conscious do you feel when speaking or being around others?
In busy places like malls or theatres, how relaxed do you usually feel?
How much effort does it take you to finish everyday tasks?
How often do you experience sudden waves of panic or terror?
When eating or drinking in public, how comfortable do you feel?
How frequently do you get into arguments or disagreements?
When left alone, do you feel uneasy or tense?
Do you feel that your work or achievements don’t get proper recognition?
Even around people, do you sometimes still feel lonely?
Have you noticed moments when you can’t sit still or keep moving?
How often do you feel that you’re not good enough or worthless?
Have familiar places ever felt strange or unreal for a moment?
When angry, do you end up shouting or throwing things?
In public, do you worry you might faint or lose balance?
How often do you feel that others might take advantage of your kindness?
Are there times when certain thoughts about intimacy make you uncomfortable?
Have you ever felt you should be punished for mistakes or wrongs?
Do you feel pressure to finish everything quickly or perfectly?
How often do you suspect something might be wrong with your body’s health?
Have you ever struggled to feel emotionally close to anyone?
How frequently do feelings of guilt cross your mind?
When thinking about yourself, do you sometimes feel something isn’t right?
